title: Happy path — canonical input flows through all stages normalized

messages.label: tool-call: { name: 'question', input: {questions:[{question,header,options:[{label,description}],multiple:false}]} }
processor writes state.input=raw, status=running
Tool.define.execute: parsed = parameters.parse(args) (preprocess is no-op on canonical)
QuestionTool.execute(parsed, ctx) → Question.ask(normalized)
Bus: question.asked → QuestionDock mounts, Question.normalize runs on questions (no-op)
user submits → tool-result
processor tool-result: safeParse → normalized==raw → state.input=normalized, status=completed

title: Noncompliant path — flat single-question recovers via preprocess (the bug fix case)

messages.label: tool-call: { name: 'question', input: {question:'X?', options:['A','B','C'], multiple:false} } (FLAT, no questions array)
processor writes state.input=raw(flat), status=running
Tool.define.execute: parsed = parse(args); preprocess wraps into {questions:[{question:'X?', header:'X?', options:[{label:'A',description:'A'},...], multiple:false}]}
QuestionTool.execute(parsed, ctx); parsed.questions is array length 1 → Question.ask(sessionID, questions, ...)
Bus: question.asked → QuestionDock renders header/options correctly (normalized)
user submits → tool-result
processor tool-result: safeParse(raw flat) → success with normalized → state.input=normalized
session history re-renders via message-part: Question.normalize(state.input) no-op (already normalized) → correct UI

title: Legacy session — raw state.input recovered via defensive normalize

messages.label: open a pre-fix session with tool part state.input still raw (string options, no header)
message-part question renderer reads state.input → calls Question.normalize → gets canonical shape
render question tabs with header fallback, options with label fallback — no blank UI

title: Un-normalizable input — error UI (no silent fallback)

messages.label: tool-call: { name: 'question', input: {baz: 1} } (completely wrong shape)
Tool.define.execute: parse throws ZodError → formatValidationError → schema-miss hint
processor tool-error: state.input=raw({baz:1}), status=error, error=hint message
UI renders explicit error box with schema-miss hint (not blank dialog)
